name: Leponeus
description: AESDR canonical mascot. Tortoise body with strapped hare-ears. The two voices fused.

expressions.name: The Doctrine
expressions.use: Default. Wordmark lockup, certificates, brand voice.

expressions.name: The Sprint
expressions.use: Bursts of velocity. Onboarding and momentum moments.

expressions.name: The Recovery
expressions.use: Sprout from shell. Lesson 09. Bounce-back moments.

expressions.name: The Rest
expressions.use: Eyes closed. Sundays only. Permission to stop.

expressions.name: The Owner
expressions.use: A on shell. Lesson 12. Final state.

rules.scarcity: Max 1 per editorial spread. 1 per badge. 1 per onboarding screen.
forbidden: No anthropomorphizing — no waving, no thumbs, no smiling.
No 9th expression without a written entry in the canon doc.
No fill colors outside the palette above.
No skewing, no warping, no perspective.

surfaces.web: Use the sprite. Reference by id.
surfaces.print: Use standalone SVG. Convert to PDF/X with embedded paths.
surfaces.app: Export PNG @1×/@2×/@3× from doctrine pose. Black square ink lockup.
surfaces.lms: Use standalone SVG inside SCORM packages.
surfaces.swag: Single-color print only — black on cream, or cream on crimson.
